title: AN ACT RENAMING THE SAN ISIDRO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ISIDRO, SORSOGON, TO PIO JEBULAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. NO. 33256 / 88 OG No. 21, 3043 (May 25, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7339, April 01, 1992 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE SAN ISIDRO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ISIDRO, SORSOGON, TO PIO JEBULAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The San Isidro Elementary School in Barangay San Isidro, Sorsogon, is hereby renamed and called as the Pio Jebulan Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 14, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 1, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
